hooks.command: current=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); default=$(git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||'); if [[ -z "$default" ]]; then default=$(git remote show origin 2>/dev/null | awk '/HEAD branch/{print $NF}'); fi; [[ -z "$default" ]] && default="master"; if [[ "$current" == "$default" ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: direct commits to '$default' are not allowed — create a feature branch first."; exit 2; fi; exit 0

hooks.prompt:
Was Edit, Write, or NotebookEdit used in this conversation?
  No  → "LGTM"
  Yes → does the pending git commit mention "Claude Code" (in --author or Co-Authored-By)?
    Yes → "LGTM"
    No  → "BLOCK: Commit has no Claude attribution. Reconsider your contribution:
- Wrote most or all code: --author='Claude Code (<model>) on behalf of <user.name> <noreply@anthropic.com>' + 'Co-Authored-By: <user.name> <user.email>'
- Minor fixes or review only: 'Co-Authored-By: Claude Code (<model>) <noreply@anthropic.com>'
Resolve user.name and user.email via git config. Never guess."
